taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, General Software Engineer
core_skills: Software engineering, Typescript, React, Angular, GoLang
skill_match_scores: Software engineering:1.0, Typescript:1.0, React:1.0, Angular:1.0, GoLang:1.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years of experience in software engineering working with modern web development technologies: Typescript, React, Angular, GoLang, Python, C# etc, Knowledge of professional software engineering practices including software development life cycles, coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations, Experience providing guidance and support to other members of the engineering team to support technical problem solving
core_responsibilities: Contribute to design, development, and delivery of releasable, high-quality software, Author code aligned with internal standards and guidance from architects to ensure maintainability and consistency across our products, Develop, maintain, and update automated test systems as functionality changes during the evolution of our products, Assess the impact of changes by actively engaging in code reviews, design reviews, and technical discussions with engineering and product teams, Monitor application performance in production and non-production environments, Debug and resolve application errors and performance issues, Continuously learn about new tools and technologies
job_summary: EMERGE is partnered with a leading insuretech company that is transforming the insurance industry through innovative cloud-based software. They are seeking Software Engineers to work in Agile Scrum teams, developing the largest insurance management platform and delivering enterprise-scale applications that meet client-specific business needs.
